title: UX Basics: Consistency and Visual Hierarchy

questions.sentence: User Experience is more than just making a website look pretty
Two fundamental principles of UX are Consistency and Visual Hierarchy
Consistency means using the same colors fonts and button styles
Visual Hierarchy is about organizing elements so that the most important information stands out
You can achieve this using size color and whitespace
Following these principles helps provide a smooth and satisfying experience for the end user
